w:r.w:t: BODIQO — TERMS OF SERVICE & REFUND POLICY (CLIENTS)
Bodiqo (formerly known as Physiques By Vinay)
Bodiqo mobile application (iOS/Android) and related web portals for clients (“App” / “Platform”)
By accessing or using the Platform, creating an account, purchasing a membership, booking a trial session, or using any of our services, you agree to these Terms.
If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.
to create an account and purchase services.
, a parent/guardian must purchase, supervise usage, and you should follow guidance of a registered medical practitioner before starting any training or nutrition program.
Bodiqo provides fitness, training and nutrition coaching services, which may include (depending on your plan):
Diet plans / meal plans and diet logging
Habit / adherence tracking (current or future features)
Your plan inclusions, start/end dates, and pricing are displayed in your membership details or invoice.
You are responsible for ensuring you are medically fit to participate.
If you have any injury, medical condition, or are pregnant, consult a registered medical practitioner before starting.
Fitness training carries inherent risks (including injury). By using the Platform or participating in training, you:
agree to follow safe technique, instructions, and progression.
You must provide accurate details and keep them updated.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login/OTP/device access.
We may suspend accounts for suspected unauthorized access, fraud, or misuse.
To maintain service quality and resolve disputes:
Official coaching communication may occur via
, depending on what is enabled for your program.
where needed for quality, dispute resolution, compliance, or safety.
Trial sessions cannot be cancelled or rescheduled once booked.
If you cancel or do not attend (no-show), the trial is treated as completed and a new trial must be booked and paid for.
to cancel or reschedule a session.
If you fail to give 2 hours’ notice, or miss a session, the session may be marked as
If your coach reschedules or misses a confirmed session, we will extend your plan validity or reschedule appropriately to make up for it.
from purchase, extendable to a maximum of
If you are unable to attend due to illness or travel, inform your coach/team in advance. Your membership may be placed on hold at our discretion, depending on plan type and timelines.
Plans purchased with special offers (e.g., discounts, extra/free sessions) may
, and must be completed within the defined validity period unless the trainer/team is responsible for rescheduling/missing sessions.
Prices are in INR unless stated otherwise.
Payment modes may include UPI/cards/bank transfer/payment gateways or other supported methods.
If any tax is deducted at source (TDS) by a corporate client paying on your behalf or via a corporate contract, documentation must be handled between the payer and the Company as applicable.
strict no-refund policy once a purchase is confirmed
Refunds may be considered only in exceptional situations such as:
confirmed technical billing error resulting in an incorrect charge.
If approved, refunds are processed within
from approval (timelines can vary by bank/payment provider).
Training packages must be completed within validity.
If a refund is exceptionally approved, a
may apply and cancellation terms will govern.
No refunds/credits are issued for failure to attend or complete a retreat.
upload illegal, abusive, or infringing content;
attempt to reverse engineer, scrape, or disrupt the Platform;
misuse messaging, scheduling, payments, or support.
We may suspend or terminate accounts for violations.
You may submit feedback, logs, progress photos, and messages (“User Content”). You grant us a limited right to use this content to:
maintain records for dispute resolution and compliance.
If we request testimonials, transformation stories, or record content during sessions/retreats:
we will seek your confirmation/permission before publishing content that identifies you, unless it is already shared publicly by you with tagging/permission;
you can ask us to stop using future content by contacting support.
The Platform may integrate with third parties, including:
Your use of third-party services is also governed by their terms and policies. We are not responsible for outages, errors, or policy changes of third parties.
Results vary by individual. We do not guarantee specific outcomes, including weight loss, fat loss, muscle gain, or performance results.
To the maximum extent permitted by law:
we are not liable for indirect/incidental/consequential damages;
our total liability for any claim is limited to the fees paid by you for the relevant service in the period giving rise to the claim.
You agree to indemnify and hold harmless the Company and its team from claims arising out of:
your violation of these Terms, or
your failure to follow safety guidance.
We may refuse entry to a session, pause service, or terminate access for reasons including:
We are not responsible for interruptions caused by events beyond our control (e.g., strikes, natural disasters, internet disruptions, venue closures, travel disruptions).
We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use after updates means you accept the updated Terms.
These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Courts in
